arguments.name: -d
arguments.description: Systematially check for all logs that have changed since specified timeframe (in minutes).

arguments.name: --discover
arguments.description: Systematially check for all logs that have changed since specified timeframe (in minutes).

arguments.name: -f
arguments.description: Skip the automated log steps and clean specified log only.
